sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (a String, b String, c Int32);
SELECT toInt16OrNull(a) - toInt16OrNull(b) AS result FROM test_table WHERE toInt16OrNull(a) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT toInt16OrNull(a - b) AS result FROM (SELECT a, b FROM test_table HAVING toInt16OrNull(a) IS NOT NULL AND toInt16OrNull(b) IS NOT NULL);
SELECT SUM(toInt16OrNull(a) - c) AS total FROM test_table GROUP BY c HAVING total > 0;
SELECT a, toInt16OrNull(b) - 0 AS difference, c FROM test_table WHERE toInt16OrNull(b) IS NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT a, b, toInt16OrNull(a) AS int_a FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_table WHERE toInt16OrNull(a) IS NULL OR toInt16OrNull(b) IS NULL;
SELECT toInt16OrNull('0') - toInt16OrNull(b) AS diff, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c ORDER BY b) AS rn FROM test_table;
SELECT AVG(toInt16OrNull(a) - toInt16OrNull(b)) AS avg_diff FROM (SELECT a, b FROM test_table WHERE a != '') GROUP BY c HAVING AVG(diff) IS NOT NULL;
